data.title: STLA Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Stellantis N.V. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in San Diego, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for investors who bought or acquired Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) securities between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. Stellantis, a global automobile company, is the subject of the lawsuit.

data.title: UPST Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Upstart Holdings, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit representing all investors who bought or acquired securities of Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST) between May 14, 2025, and November 4, 2025. Upstart, in conjunction with its stakeholders, faces legal action following alleged misconduct during that period.

data.title: X-energy Announces Pricing of Upsized Initial Public Offering
data.description: X-energy, Inc., a prominent company in advanced nuclear reactor and fuel technology based in Rockville, Maryland, has revealed the details of its expanded initial public offering. The IPO consists of 44,254,659 shares of its Class A common stock priced at $23.00 per share. Additionally, X-energy has provided the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 6,638,198 more shares of Class A common stock. This move by X-energy signifies a significant step in the company's growth strategy. The trading of these shares is anticipated to commence shortly.

data.title: Renesas Announces Consolidated Forecasts
data.description: In Tokyo today, Renesas Electronics Corporation revealed their consolidated financial predictions for the six-month period closing on June 30, 2026. The company provided estimates for their upcoming financial performance during this specified timeframe.

data.title: Renesas Reports Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In Tokyo today, Renesas Electronics disclosed its consolidated financial results based on IFRS for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: QNAP Launches QSW-M7230-2X4F24T L3 Lite 100GbE Managed Switch, Featuring MC-LAG and AVoIP
data.description: Today, in Taipei on April 23, 2026, a renowned computing, networking, and storage solution innovator, QNAP® Systems, Inc., revealed the introduction of the QSW-M7230-2X4F24T. This cutting-edge L3 Lite managed 100GbE switch is specifically crafted for enterprise network enhancements and high-performance storage.

data.title: Resolutions Adopted at the  Annual General Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting  for Grupo Aeroportuario Del Pacifico  on April 22, 2026
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico on April 23, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) disclosed decisions reached at the recent Annual General Ordinary Shareholders’ Meetings. The meetings, held with an 84.01% quorum, deliberated on key resolutions.

data.title: TOTAL PLAY ANNOUNCES REVENUE OF Ps.11,177 MILLION AND EBITDA OF Ps.4,849 MILLION IN THE FIRST QUARTER OF 2026
data.description: In the recent period, Totalplay Residencial saw a notable increase of 115,020 net subscribers, which has contributed to the growth of the company's service revenues. Additionally, the EBITDA less Capex and interest reached an all-time high of Ps.883 million in the first quarter. There was also a significant 9% decrease in debt with costs from loans, showcasing positive financial progress for the company.
